case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MERLY ESTHER CHAN XOOL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XOOL, MERLY ESTHER CHAN $845.64 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED SEP-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT XOOL, MERLY ESTHER CHAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT XOOL, MERLY ESTHER CHAN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,445.64 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT XOOL, MERLY ESTHER CHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
